parameters.query: SELECT id, database_id, title, content, url, created_time, last_edited_time FROM s_notion.pages WHERE processed = 0 LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, feed_id, feed_name, author, title, content, url, published_at FROM s_substack.posts WHERE processed = 0 LIMIT 10;
SELECT id, author, content, url, published_at FROM s_linkedin.ugc_posts WHERE processed = 0 LIMIT 10;

values.content:
=Analyze the following text and categorize it under one of these primary categories:
- Software Engineering
- AI / ML
- Business Strategy
- Data Science & Engineering
- Product Management
- Career & Growth
- Other

Return a JSON object only:
{
  "category": "Category Name"
}

parameters.query:
=INSERT INTO m_staging.notion_pages (id, database_id, title, content, cleaned_content, category, content_hash, created_time, last_edited_time, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Clean Notion Content').json.id }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Notion Content').json.database_id }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Notion Content').json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Notion Content').json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Notion Content').json.cleaned_content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.parse($json.response || $json.content).category }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Notion Content').json.content_hash }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Notion Content').json.created_time }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Notion Content').json.last_edited_time }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  title = EXCLUDED.title, 
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  cleaned_content = EXCLUDED.cleaned_content,
  category = EXCLUDED.category,
  content_hash = EXCLUDED.content_hash,
  last_edited_time = EXCLUDED.last_edited_time
RETURNING id;

=INSERT INTO m_staging.substack_posts (id, feed_id, feed_name, author, title, content, cleaned_content, category, content_hash, published_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Clean Substack Content').json.id }}',
  {{ $('Clean Substack Content').json.feed_id || 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $('Clean Substack Content').json.feed_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Substack Content').json.author.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Substack Content').json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Substack Content').json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Substack Content').json.cleaned_content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.parse($json.response || $json.content).category }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Substack Content').json.content_hash }}',
  '{{ $('Clean Substack Content').json.published_at }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  title = EXCLUDED.title, 
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  cleaned_content = EXCLUDED.cleaned_content,
  category = EXCLUDED.category,
  content_hash = EXCLUDED.content_hash
RETURNING id;

=INSERT INTO m_staging.linkedin_posts (id, author, content, cleaned_content, category, content_hash, published_at, processed)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Clean LinkedIn Content').json.id }}',
  '{{ $('Clean LinkedIn Content').json.author.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Clean LinkedIn Content').json.content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $('Clean LinkedIn Content').json.cleaned_content.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ JSON.parse($json.response || $json.content).category }}',
  '{{ $('Clean LinkedIn Content').json.content_hash }}',
  '{{ $('Clean LinkedIn Content').json.published_at }}',
  0
)
ON CONFLICT (id) 
DO UPDATE SET 
  content = EXCLUDED.content,
  cleaned_content = EXCLUDED.cleaned_content,
  category = EXCLUDED.category,
  content_hash = EXCLUDED.content_hash
RETURNING id;

SELECT 'notion_pages' AS source_table, id, title, cleaned_content, created_time AS event_time FROM m_staging.notion_pages WHERE processed = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'substack_posts' AS source_table, id, title, cleaned_content, published_at AS event_time FROM m_staging.substack_posts WHERE processed = 0
UNION ALL
SELECT 'linkedin_posts' AS source_table, id, '' AS title, cleaned_content, published_at AS event_time FROM m_staging.linkedin_posts WHERE processed = 0 LIMIT 10;

=INSERT INTO m_episodic.memory_events (event_name, event_description, event_timestamp, actors, source_table, source_id, outcome)
VALUES (
  '{{ $json.event_name.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.event_description.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  '{{ $json.event_timestamp }}',
  '{{ $json.actors }}'::jsonb,
  '{{ $json.source_table }}',
  '{{ $json.source_id }}',
  '{{ $json.outcome.replace(/'/g, "''") }}'
);
